title: Passkeys
drDigitalIntro:
Passkeys let you sign in without typing a password.
• Instead, your device uses Face ID, a fingerprint, or your PIN.
• They're stored on your device and can't be stolen in a data breach.
• More sites — Google, Amazon, Microsoft — are switching to them.

playgroundTask.goal: You signed in with a passkey — no password needed

steps.say: Instead of typing a password, click 'Sign in with Passkey' — your fingerprint does the rest.

drDigitalSuccess: You signed in with a passkey! No password was typed or sent — your fingerprint stays on your device, so there's nothing for hackers to steal.
drDigitalHint: Look below the Log In button for the 'Sign in with Passkey' option.
